tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show an elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible prediabetes/early diabetes, despite a normal fasting glucose. Renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic status and consideration of further evaluation or intervention for glucose control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Facharzt für Allgemeinmedizin Johann Holbach
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
